## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI/Build

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant checks/tests locally.
- [ ] I verified behavior for the changed paths.

## Documentation checklist

- [ ] If this PR changes user-facing behavior (CLI/output/workflow), I updated the relevant docs in docs/.
- [ ] If CLI flags/commands changed, I updated docs/cli-guide.md and README.md examples.
- [ ] If workspace version changed, I updated docs/changelog.md and docs/releasenotes.md.

## Notes

Add any reviewer context, tradeoffs, or follow-ups.
